svg.aria-label: Bar chart showing safe exposure minutes halving every 3 dB starting from 85 dB at 8 hours

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial

svg.text: Reference: 85 dB = 8 hours (480 min). Each +3 dB halves the time.
